datasets.label: Airline Passengers
datasets.description: Classic monthly airline passenger data (1949-1960) with trend and multiplicative seasonality.

dna.summary: This time series is of 'trending' type. A strong upward trend is observed (strength: 0.75). Weak seasonality detected (strength: 0.24). Forecast difficulty: medium. Long memory characteristics present (Hurst: 1.00).

datasets.label: Retail Sales
datasets.description: Daily retail sales with weekly/annual seasonality and holiday spikes.

dna.summary: This time series is of 'trending' type. A strong upward trend is observed (strength: 0.59). Forecast difficulty: medium. Long memory characteristics present (Hurst: 0.96).

datasets.label: Stock Price
datasets.description: Daily stock closing price — random walk with volatility clustering.

dna.summary: This time series is of 'trending' type. A strong downward trend is observed (strength: 0.63). Forecast difficulty: medium. Long memory characteristics present (Hurst: 1.00).

datasets.label: Energy Consumption
datasets.description: Hourly energy consumption (kWh) with daily and weekly patterns.

dna.summary: This time series is of 'seasonal' type. A clear seasonal pattern exists (strength: 0.96, period: 24). Forecast difficulty: medium.

datasets.label: Web Traffic
datasets.description: Daily web pageviews with exponential growth and weekly pattern.

dna.summary: This time series is of 'stationary' type. A weak trend is present (strength: 0.46). A clear seasonal pattern exists (strength: 0.42, period: 180). Forecast difficulty: hard. Long memory characteristics present (Hurst: 1.00).

datasets.label: Intermittent Demand
datasets.description: Sparse/lumpy demand pattern — common in spare parts and low-volume products.

dna.summary: This time series is of 'intermittent' type. 82% of data are zero values, indicating intermittent demand. High volatility observed (index: 1.42). Forecast difficulty: very hard.
